title: Fault-Tolerant Surface Code Benchmarks on Superconducting Qubits
abstract: Experimental progress and error budgets for logical operations using repeated syndrome extraction.

title: Tensor-Network Methods for Noisy Quantum Circuits
abstract: Efficient approximations for noisy intermediate-scale circuits and practical complexity tradeoffs.

title: Cryogenic Packaging Constraints for Scalable Qubit Arrays
abstract: Materials and fabrication bottlenecks affecting yield in dense quantum packages.
